name: Shami Kebab
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dhal or dried split peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak dhal (or dried peas) in water for 10 minutes, then drain.
2. In a large skillet, bring 3 cups of water to a boil and add ground beef, dhal or peas, and the next 7 ingredients.
3. Cook approximately 45 minutes, or until all liquid has evaporated.
4. Allow mixture to cool slightly.
5. Add liquid egg substitute. Blend the meat mixture into a fine paste using a blender or food processor; the liquid egg substitute provides moisture.
6. After forming the paste, stir in chopped onion, coriander leaves, and green chillies.
7. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil or spray with noncaloric spray to prevent sticking.
8. Scoop 1/4-cup portions onto the sheet and shape into patties.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes, or until set.
10. Carefully remove patties from the pan using a spatula. Serve on a grill for a hot summer day.
